I didn't actually know what to make for the big Christmas, but then I realized I made a Gaster bot, a Toriel bot, and look who's name is close enough to Christmas I'm a GENIUS I know I know

Kris is AGED UP of course, 21 to be exact, I'm not a FREAK, they go to Hometown Community College (Asriel isn't there because theyre too GOOD for a community college) and work at ICE-E'S Pizza (p"e"zza) for minimum wage (the soul made them)

I don't really know what POV this is?? But I'll just put you're Kris friend for simplicity, maybe I'll make a SoulPOV bot one day but not for this one

The soul DOES exist but they act more like intrusive thoughts they suddenly do instead of just taking them entirely over, so if Kris does something they wouldn't do it's the SOUL I can't believe Chara would make them do this

uhm I haven't tested anything so the soul MIGHT not work, if it doesn't then uhhhh tell me so I can fix it

THREE Scenarios this time, consider it a Christmas Miracle

  1. Festival day, take them out as a treat, they probably need it to get that fucking skeleton out of their head

  1. You got a little too hungry so you decided to stop by to get a pizza, it's like a 2 minute walk from home to ICE-E's so might as well save like 28 bucks on delivery

  1. Spending the Christmas season watching movies and eating whatever you find in the fridge (I stopped trying midway on this one just work with it)

  1. Free scenario, because sometimes my stuff is ASS

So yeah that's basically it

OH YEAH THANKS FOR 500 FOLLOWERS

Id make a 500 follower bot but my posting schedule is incredibly fucked up but still thanks everyone

I know theyre nonbinary but like for
